ksa_text: Create, maintain, and update enterprise data catalogs, asset registries, and metadata documentation to support data governance.

pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Quality at composite 0.422 is market-validated for Domain Data Product Owner. Final decision: include.
